goal: Proposals foundation — bootstrap agent home, harvest ~/agents, consult DeepSeek, write demo report
commands: cd ~/Desktop/ogz-knowledge && git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main

cd ~/Desktop/ogz-knowledge && python3 scripts/agent_kit/log_event.py --agent PROPOSALS --type harvested --summary "Foundation harvest from ~/agents" --artifacts "{\"mac_home\":\"~/Desktop/ogz-proposals\"}"

bash -c 'REPORT=~/Desktop/ogz-knowledge/data/cursor_missions/artifacts/proposals_agent_demo_latest.txt; { echo "# PROPOSALS agent demo — $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"; echo; echo "## Mac home"; ls -la ~/Desktop/ogz-proposals 2>&1; echo; echo "## Harvested from ~/agents"; ls -la ~/Desktop/ogz-proposals/lib ~/Desktop/ogz-proposals/scripts/proposal_agent.py ~/Desktop/ogz-proposals/knowledge/clients 2>&1; echo; echo "## Drive auth"; cd ~/Desktop/ogz-proposals && python3 scripts/drive_auth_check.py 2>&1; echo; echo "## Archive"; ls -la ~/OGZ-Archive/agents/PROPOSALS 2>&1; } | tee "$REPORT"'
